deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. Close May 1 2026. Template building for branded property analysis.
deals.next: Chris pull MLS comps and RPR report, feed to Sirhc for analysis sheet

logs.m: Investor sent deal via Homestead Vested link. Using as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land with development potential. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home project (half units for veterans, half profit, ~$150K offer). Title defect resolved but no path forward. Chris walking away, signs picked up.

logs.m: Listing terminated. Signs retrieved. No path forward with sellers or development concept.
Isaac interested in mobile home development concept. Josh LT flagged as potential partner.
Isaac development discussion held. Sisters excited about concept.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: 3/2 1994 home on 2972 sqft. VA loan payoff ~$493K. Underwater by $93K-$143K. Sellers moving back in to make repairs and relist. Terminated May 29 on good terms.

logs.m: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in, plan to relist after updates and repairs.
Call with sellers. Honest conversation on three paths. Chandler laid off (hardship doc). Leaning toward short sale but appreciate honest approach.
Where Things Stand email sent. Option 3 highlighted at $518,999. Commission negotiation lever offered.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1886 sqft, 2011 build, Laura Heights PUD. Payoff discrepancy: seller says $170K, records show $192K. June deadline for NC relocation. Second-look buyers showing strong interest.
deals.next: Confirm showing time for May 30, follow up on pre-inspection report offer

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back - their favorite property. Walk-in closet slightly small for one buyer. Pre-inspection report offered.
Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed. Kept conversation open.
MLS live. First showing 9:15am. Cultural concerns on street direction noted.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Estate sale. Lien blocker resolved via Fernando Castillo signature. Cleared and funded Apr 26, officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Post-close follow-ups pending (gift delivery, thank yous)

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Lien release delivered Apr 21, cleared title.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release at mobile notary. Joy signed at UPS Store.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (lien holder family). Willing to work with us.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3/2, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres, Frio County. Payoff ~$257K as of May 2026. Divorce situation. CMA complete. Recommended list price $295,000. Met at property May 15.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender, confirm renovation status, get listing agreement signed

logs.m: Met at property ~10am. CMA pulled, payoff confirmed ~$257K. Net sheet built. Files saved to listing-info folder.
Prior VA loan purchase clients. Going through divorce, need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring this week. Water meter pending. Work started May 9. HouzzPro/Matt Toney contractor. Cameras installed. Multiple showings completed.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD for utility confirmation, replace camera batteries, get listing agreement to bank

logs.m: Installed 3 cameras, fully covered. Electricians reconnected. Drywall complete, paint finishing. Flooring starts tomorrow or Thursday. Water meter needs set in 1-2 days.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Police reports still stalled.
Work officially starting. Matt Toney dropping dumpsters.

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. Contract at $113,000 with Espinoza buyers. EMD not yet received. TXR 1903 amendment pending signature from buyer agent Javier. Turn-key hunting operation included.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received and signed amendment back from buyer agent Javier

logs.m: Espinoza buyers under contract at $113K. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. Backup offer option discussed with other agent.
Steve signed amendment. Price reduced to $117,500. MLS updated. Agent outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. Steve sent photos. Drone footage flagged as next content priority.

leads.title: Pamela Moore
leads.detail: Paying $1700/month rent. Military retirement + 2 daughters disability checks. Between jobs. Fixing credit proactively. VA loan eligible, zero down. Nextdoor connection from High Country neighborhood.
leads.next: Call today (May 14) - overdue since Apr 30. Keep light, check on sick grandkid first

logs.m: Flagged to call today. Has been overdue since Apr 30. VA buyer, motivated. Do not let this slip.
Spoke today - sick grandkid, not right moment. Following up tomorrow (Apr 30).
Confirmed military retirement + daughters live with her. Follow-up text sent with VA info.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration (healing through gardens). Trust-based, long-term potential.
leads.next: Follow up personally - ask permission for story, deepen relationship

logs.m: Garden community connection. Need to follow up and ask permission for story content.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Met in person. Investor status confirmed. Buy box unknown. Area of interest likely Schertz based on context. Full intake still needed.
leads.next: Full intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy (flip vs hold)

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. No further details on file yet.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor (behind her) may have passed away. Son now owns house. Previous owner was avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet. Probate or inherited property opportunity.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - sons name and contact. Reach out with garden angle.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned deceased neighbor, son now owns house. Avid gardener angle. Probate potential.

leads.title: Bryce (Wife - VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military (VA loan eligible). Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Natural relationship built.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info next site visit at 181 CR. Confirm wifes VA eligibility. Send VA guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Currently renting in SA area.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner (downline agent, Schertz/Cibolo). Has buyer interested in property needing work. Unique situation. Details pending from May 11 conversation.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer, property type, price range, financing

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome on May 11. Buyer interested in fixer property. Details pending.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped Brandon start in real estate. Opportunity 1: uncle rental at 8527 Green Bliss. Opportunity 2: moms new construction buyer (Milagros Stringer, 210-378-5147). Budget $50K down, target ~$1000/month payment.
leads.next: Buyer rep needs signature from Milagros. Register Chris as agent on first builder visit to Grace Gardens.

logs.m: Reached out to builders for options. Pulling inventory keeping payments ~$1000/mo with $50K down.
Buyer rep signed. Rental setup docs in folder. Not locked to Grace Gardens.
Met in person at Green Bliss. Message sent about PM options. Keeping it simple and relationship-first.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold by landlord. Duplex being renovated, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction, no HOA firm requirement. Previously looked at 916 Marriott (foundation issues, roof 2011 - pass). Connected with lenders Zach Schaphorst and Erik Williams. 301 W Saxet Corpus Christi deal fell through - too much for them.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Revisit new construction search. Still actively searching.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal - too much for them. Still actively searching.
Isaac brought wholesale deal 301 W Saxet Corpus at $85K. Connected Mike and Alice with Isaac directly.
Text from Mike - rental being sold. 916 Marriott assessed and passed. Pivoting to new construction.

priorities.notes: Paying $1700/month rent. VA eligible (zero down). Between jobs but motivated. Last contact Apr 29 (sick grandkid). Must reconnect today.

priorities.notes: Met at property May 15. Payoff confirmed ~$257K. Underwater situation requires realistic pricing. Also explore Colton contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751 (Kendall connection).
